composer: Artie MATTHEWS – Mort GREENE – George CATES

notation_notes.breaks: Printed note under the first row: 'The breaks in the first four bars are differently set according to the versions.'
notation_notes.blues_type: Marker (2) beside first strain reads 'BLUES in F (type A)'.
notation_notes.modulation: Printed note above the last row: 'The next Modulation is only found in the Hot Five or Johnny Dodds versions of 1927 just before the third theme.'
notation_notes.s1_bar3_bar4: First strain bars 3-4 are drawn as a diagonal hatched box then a dash; the header note says the breaks are set differently by version. Bar 3 encoded as written F, bar 4 as dash-repeat of F.
notation_notes.modulation_row: Final row labelled 'M' is a modulation passage found only in some versions, not part of the numbered form.

title: WEARY BLUES
